figure.title: Write Request with Scattered Byte Enables
figure.purpose: Shows an example of a write request where not all bytes within the address range are enabled for writing.

technical_summary: ReqAddr[6:0] points to the start of DW0.
ReqLen specifies a length covering multiple doublewords.
Byte Enables are mixed (0 and 1) across the targeted bytes.
Only bytes with a corresponding Byte Enable of '1' are written.

packet_layout.description: Per-byte write enables for the beat
Data payload for the write request

critical_facts: Byte enables provide granular, per-byte write control, allowing non-contiguous data within a single request to be written.
